overview: A high-fidelity study platform with an AI tutor sidebar, learning analytics, smart resource cards, mobile flashcards, smart search, and a guided onboarding flow — all wrapped in a sleek dark mode design with glassmorphism and indigo accents.
features: AI tutor sidebar with chat, code blocks, and LaTeX rendering
Learning analytics with progress rings and AI vs. solo hours comparison chart
Smart resource cards grid with AI summary snippets and quiz generation
Mobile-optimized flashcard module with card-flip animation
Smart search with AI Search, Find Buddies, and Browse Notes modes
3-step onboarding flow with AI mascot guide
Dark mode design system with Inter font, glassmorphism, and soft indigo accents
